name: GitHub Copilot ACP
description: GitHub Copilot via Agent Communication Protocol — spawns 'copilot --acp --stdio' subprocess and exchanges JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout. Distinct from the REST 'copilot' plugin. Override binary path via OPENCOMPUTER_COPILOT_ACP_COMMAND or COPILOT_CLI_PATH. ACP JSON-RPC transport is a focused follow-up; v1 ships discovery scaffold.
